name: Ironhammer the Giant
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鉄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アイアンハンマー
desc: If you control "D.D. Esper Star Sparrow", "Beast-Warrior Puma" and "Phoenix Beast Gairuda", you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). While this card is face-up on the field, it cannot change its battle position. Once per turn: You can target 1 monster you control; it can attack your opponent directly this turn.
mnst_eff: If you control "D.D. Esper Star Sparrow", "Beast-Warrior Puma" and "Phoenix Beast Gairuda", you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). While this card is face-up on the field, it cannot change its battle position. Once per turn: You can target 1 monster you control; it can attack your opponent directly this turn.
